scripts.dev:web: cp .env apps/web/.env 2>/dev/null || true; npm run dev --workspace=apps/web
scripts.dev:api: cp .env apps/api/.env 2>/dev/null || true; cd apps/api && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && cd apps/api && uv venv && uv pip install -r requirements.txt
